name: What's difference between workers comp and personal injury lawsuit for job injury?
description: Comp no-fault limited; PI fault-based fuller.[3]

mainEntity.name: What's difference between workers comp and personal injury lawsuit for job injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp no-fault limited; PI fault-based fuller.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Comp: No-fault, limited benefits, no sue employer; PI: Sue third parties for full damages.[3] Key factors: Comp first for medical/wages.[2] PI for extras like pain.[3] Comp exclusive vs employer.[1] Lawyer advises paths.[3]
